name: The Postmodern Mind
recipeInstructions:
1. In a well-chilled martini glass, layer the liqueurs in the order given by slowly pouring each one across the back of a spoon whose tip is held against the back of the glass.
2. Alternatively, mix all the ingredients together and serve chilled.
Note: This recipe serves 1 person with approximately 115 calories, 1 gram of fat (7% of total calories), 0 milligrams of cholesterol, 0 grams of protein, 14 grams of carbohydrates, and 2 milligrams of sodium.
